chapter_title.en: Justice harsher for oppressors than oppression for victims

text: ٣٤١. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): يَوْمُ الْعَدْلِ عَلَى الظَّالِمِ أَشَدُّ مِنْ يَومِ الْجَوْرِ عَلَى الْمَظْلُومِ!

en.sayed-ali-raza: 341. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: The day of justice will be severer on the oppressor than the day of oppression on the oppressed.
